{{CargoOrgan
|name=Willpower Cell
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10923
|idx=134
|description=Fuses consciousness with bio-magnetic fields to enforce personal reality. Side effects include Earth's rejection.
|skill=
|hp=2190
|def=245
|atk=364
|rush=242
|gene1=All Rocket Cabin Max Cap +4%
|gene2=All Rocket Cabin production +2%
|gene3=Quantum Amp Max Cap +40%
|gene4=Quantum Amp production +20%
|gene5=Quantum Amp gives Nebula Chest Shards by +40%
|gene6=Quantum Amp production +20%
|gene7=Quantum Amp production +40% (Awakened)
|}}
